name: nimic
desc: Nimic allows using pure Python as a systems language with AOT compilation. It provides systems-level functionality directly within CPython (backed by the built…
descFull: Nimic allows using pure Python as a systems language with AOT compilation. It provides systems-level functionality directly within CPython (backed by the built-in ctypes module), while allowing the exact same code to compile Ahead-Of-Time (AOT) to an efficient native binary.

hnPosts.title: Show HN: Nimic – Pure Python as a systems language with AOT compilation
